name: Pyramid Clicker
short_description: Pyramid Clicker is a real adventure! Upgrade your perks, buy artifacts that grant incredible bonuses, and experience the power of prestige. This game offers vast opportunities for progression that will keep you hooked for hours on end.
detailed_description:
Key Features:

Over 1000 perk levels: Each level unlocks new possibilities and strengthens your empire.

Progress Bar System:

○ 10 unique progress bars to track various aspects of your development

○ Each progress bar is upgraded and saved separately
○ Unique bonuses for filling each progress bar
○ Increase the filling speed of progress bars using perks and artifacts

Artifact System:

Collect unique items that provide powerful bonuses and change your gameplay strategy.
Automation system: Acquire automated actions that perform short but crucial operations. Improve their duration and cooldown times using perks and artifacts.
Four types of currency: Manage your empire's economy by balancing different resources.
Books, scarabs, and papyri: Gather these valuable items and enhance their drop rates. They're essential for achieving prestige!

Free choice of prestige

Dozens of prestige, each with its own unique bonuses.


Deep strategy: Every decision impacts the development of your empire. Choose perks wisely, collect the right artifacts, and optimize automation for maximum efficiency.
Continuous growth: The game offers endless opportunities for expansion and improvements. Each achievement opens new horizons.
